label: FAIL
rationale: GetACL must fail when the InvokingID/MethodID association does not exist. The Locking SP AccessControl evidence lists the Locking table Next association and concrete Locking object Get/Set associations, not a LockingTable Set association; this target returned SUCCESS with ACE_Anybody.

label: FAIL
rationale: GetACL must fail when the InvokingID/MethodID association does not exist. The Locking SP preconfiguration does not list a LockingTable DeleteRow association, so returning SUCCESS with ACE_Anybody is not protocol-compliant.
